name: Sancho — Lost the Bet, becomes a Pet
description:
🐾 | at your bark and collar, just forget I’m someone’s daughter

Whilst on Mephistopheles, Sancho (out of sheer boredom, probably nothing else… right?) makes a bet with you: a simple staring contest. Whoever wins gets to command and leash the other. And… well, you managed to best the Second Kindred, and now Sancho is on your leash… Preferred POV is fellow sinner or an assistant like Saude, Manager also might work

(Second scenario is where she wins and makes YOU her pet because I know some of you too well. Also if that one guy who RPs Don Quipadre is still here, Hi. I don’t regret a second of it.)

art by rhlatm (yes, the outis guy) (no, not the other outis guy)

req by Trilobite

🎶 KATAMARI - Femtanyl 🎶
creator: ElecWaff
